AbstractJpaDao<K,T> - Class in jpa.dao.generic
Generic DAO infrastructure component AbstractJpaDao.
AbstractJpaDao(Class<T>) - Constructor for class jpa.dao.generic.AbstractJpaDao
 
ACCESS_TOKEN_SERVICE - Static variable in class jpa.config.Instance
 
ACCESS_TOKEN_TTL_ENV - Static variable in class jpa.config.AuthConfig
Environment variable holding access-token TTL in seconds.
ACCESS_TOKEN_TTL_PROPERTY - Static variable in class jpa.config.AuthConfig
System property holding access-token TTL in seconds.
accessToken() - Method in record class jpa.dto.auth.TokenPairResponseDto
Returns the value of the accessToken record component.
AccessTokenClaimsDto - Record Class in jpa.dto.security
Immutable payload containing validated claims extracted from a JWT access token.
AccessTokenClaimsDto(UUID, String, String, Instant, Instant) - Constructor for record class jpa.dto.security.AccessTokenClaimsDto
Creates an instance of a AccessTokenClaimsDto record class.
accessTokenExpiresAt() - Method in record class jpa.dto.auth.TokenPairResponseDto
Returns the value of the accessTokenExpiresAt record component.
AccessTokenService - Interface in jpa.security.interfaces
Defines JWT and refresh-token primitives used by authentication components.
AccessTokenServiceImpl - Class in jpa.security.impl
Default implementation of AccessTokenService backed by HMAC-SHA256.
AccessTokenServiceImpl(String, long, long) - Constructor for class jpa.security.impl.AccessTokenServiceImpl
Builds a token service with explicit signing key and TTL values.

Resolves authentication-related runtime configuration.
AuthController - Class in jpa.controllers
REST endpoints for authentication and token refresh.

Creates a controller wired with default application dependencies.

Service contract for authentication operations.

Default authentication service implementation.
